name: author retry nudge repairs human outcome spectrum

source.purpose: Regression coverage for live Author 502s where the first setup attempt emits procedural outcome-spectrum tiers instead of human consequences.

errors: chapter_frame.outcome_spectrum.clean must name a human consequence, named entity, or relationship/cost
chapter_frame.outcome_spectrum.failure must name a human consequence, named entity, or relationship/cost
containsAll: Rewrite only the invalid outcome tiers
clean: who remains safe, trusted, loyal, free, or still willing to help
failure: who is exposed, hunted, burned, betrayed, or made unsafe

retryableErrors: chapter_frame.outcome_spectrum.clean must name a human consequence, named entity, or relationship/cost
chapter_frame.outcome_spectrum.failure must name a human consequence, named entity, or relationship/cost
